creator: ross@ross-williams.net
text:
Created attachment 210305
Update net-mgmt/softflowd port to 1.0.0

Update softflowd port to version 1.0.0. Current port Makefile references an arbitrary commit between 0.9.9 and 1.0.0, so this brings it up to date with the latest released version.

Automake now installs `softflowd` and `softflowctl` in `%PREFIX%/bin` instead of `%PREFIX%/sbin`, so PLIST and rc script updated accordingly.
